site.title: Nike Surge X — Faster Has No Finish Line

hero.subheading: The Nike Surge X doesn't care about your comfort zone. Zero-drag Flyknit. Full-length carbon. Built for the runners who'd rather break than settle.

cards.title: FULL-LENGTH CARBON
cards.description: A carbon fibre plate that spans heel to toe. No flex loss. No wasted energy. Every ounce of force you put down comes back harder. This isn't cushioning — it's a catapult.

cards.title: REACT X FOAM
cards.description: Nike React X responds to your stride in real time. Firm at impact. Soft at rest. It reads the way you run and adapts before your next footstrike. Your shoes just got smarter than you.

cards.title: WAFFLE GRIP OUTSOLE
cards.description: Derived from Nike's original waffle iron innovation, re-engineered for 2025. Grips tarmac, trail, and track without compromise. Built for the athletes who don't pick lanes.

spotlight.tagline: Born on the track. Built for the streets. Made for the ones who never stop.

manifesto.quote: You don't wait for fast. You hunt it down. You drag it out of the dark and make it yours.

cards.text: Forty seconds off my marathon PB. The carbon plate doesn't negotiate — it just launches. Every single step feels like the gun just went off. I've never worn anything that made me feel this dangerous.
cards.name: Marcus T.

cards.text: I used to switch shoes between track and trail. Now I just lace up and go. The Surge X doesn't care about the surface — and neither do I anymore. This shoe turned me into a different kind of runner.
cards.name: Priya K.

cards.text: I coach sixty athletes. Every single one who's tried the Surge X refuses to go back. The React X foam adapts to completely different gaits within strides. This is the most intelligent shoe Nike has ever made.
cards.name: Dean F.

cta.headline: STOP TRAINING. START HUNTING.
cta.subtext: Free shipping Australia-wide. 30-day returns. No questions asked.

footer.brandDescription: Nike, Inc. Just Do It. Performance footwear and apparel for athletes who refuse to be average.
